message:
feat(E4.F2.T4): add validation artifact bundling and triage summary tests (35 tests)

ValidationBundle model with TierResult, PerfResult, LogFieldCoverage,
and TriageSummary for go/no-go review. BundleBuilder collects tier
results, perf benchmarks, log field coverage, and generates triage
summaries with wave readiness (BT0-BT5) and recommendations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
